pending_work.description: refactor: extract renderKanbanColumn helper and KANBAN_EMPTY_ICON constant. Branch kanbanbot/improve-kanban-column-helper-20260418 created locally with commit 1f8ab3c. Changes: extract KANBAN_EMPTY_ICON module-level constant, extract renderKanbanColumn(tasks, emptyLabel) helper (removes 3 near-identical ternary blocks in renderKanban), fix HUB_INTEGRATION region marker from '// #region' to '//#region'. All lint/tests pass.
eng: pin @biomejs/biome@^2.4.12 as devDependency in package.json. Add npm run lint script. IMPLEMENTED in multiple runs. Issue #34 already created as protected-files workaround.

infrastructure_notes: safeoutputs MCP server unavailable for 9+ consecutive runs. Tool 'create_pull_request', 'noop', 'add_comment', 'missing_tool' all return 'Tool does not exist'. Branch kanbanbot/improve-kanban-column-helper-20260418 created locally but cannot be pushed as PR. 6 open KanbanBot PRs (#31-#37) await maintainer review.
